[Readme assets/splash.png]

Welcome to the Readme for ‘The Modern Vampire: Shedding Light From the Dark’; this document will explain how to access and interact with the site. 

**What is ‘The Modern Vampire’ site?**  
The website is an interactive experience, targeted at fans of gothic/vampire fiction, that explores how racial issues are depicted, symbolised and interpreted within the genre. It does this by allowing the user to enter the crypts of six vampire characters, who have been reimagined/recast as people of colour. Inside the user will find objects related to the characters, information about them and analyses of their racial representation from a variety of sources. The experience aims to convey the ability of vampire fiction to be used to shed light on real life racial inequalities.  

**Accessing the site:**  
The project can be accessed via local (a PC/laptop) and remote hosts (Github). Due to the number and size of the project assets, it is recommended that the site is hosted locally. It is still possible to access the site via remote hosts but some images/videos may take a longer time to load. It is also recommended that the site is accessed on the Google Chrome browser.  
	  
	Local hosting:

1. Download the Visual Studio Code application at [https://code.visualstudio.com/Download](https://code.visualstudio.com/Download) [![][image2]](https://code.visualstudio.com/Download)  
2. Install the Live Server extension within the application via ‘Extensions’ \> ‘Search’ (live server) \> ‘Install’.

   ![][image3]

3. Open the project folder in the application via ‘File’ \> ‘Open folder’ \> ‘Select Folder’.  
   ![][image4]  
4. Select the ‘index.html’ file and click ‘Go Live’ in the bottom right corner. This should load the site in your browser. 

   ![][image5]

   

   

	Remote hosting:

1. The project page is hosted on Github and can be accessed via this link: [https://catcoder139.github.io/Final-media-project-/](https://catcoder139.github.io/Final-media-project-/) 

Due to the fixed aspect ratio of the site, you may have to use the magnify feature of your browser to zoom in/out depending on the screen size of your device.

**Interacting with the site:**

At the splash page, click the mouse to enter the main page.   
![][image6]  
On the main page, navigate between the first and second set of crypts using the arrow controls.

Click a crypt to enter it. 

On the character pages, scroll up and down to look at the new and old versions of the character.

Hover over the objects to read about some of the character’s story.   
![][image7]

Click the candles to light them, this will take you to the ‘enlightened’ version of the page.

Hover over the objects again to read analyses about the character.  
![][image8]

Scroll to the bottom and click the hyperlinked text to be taken to the full analysis at its original source. 

Exit the crypt by clicking on the X in the top right corner. 

Explore the rest of the characters using the same methods.

Thank you for reading and please enjoy\!
